{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine'''|дєЕйЇїз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].
